name: block-latest-empty
description: Empty chain is a VALID state, not an error: GET /block/latest returns HTTP 200 with block:null, height:null, c:<GENESIS_C>. This intentionally diverges from pof (pof returns 404 no_blocks) — the plan rationale (§2 N0 task 3) is that clients always receive a chain-head reference so they can post /ticket and /submit against genesis without a separate bootstrap call.
